title: The Delhi University Act, 1922
full_text: The Delhi University Act, 1922 दिल्‍ली विश्‍वविद्यालय अधिनियम, 1922 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 192208 Act Number: 08 Enactment Date: 1922-03-15 Act Year: 1922 Short Title: The Delhi University Act, 1922 Hindi Title: दिल्‍ली विश्‍वविद्यालय अधिनियम, 1922 Long Title: An Act to establish and incorporate a teaching and affiliating University at Delhi.
